addition.item: Added full Joomla 6 native DevArt Business package
Added administrator component for managing business listings
Added frontend business directory module
Added business categories with unlimited hierarchy support
Added tags support
Added business galleries integration with DevArt Gallery
Added Google Maps integration
Added business opening hours
Added business contact information
Added website and social links
Added business videos support
Added featured businesses
Added CSV import and export tools
Added complete JSON backup and restore
Added maintenance and cache management tools
Added GitHub-based Joomla update server support
Added automatic image optimization during upload
Added automatic image resize with configurable maximum dimensions
Added optional WebP image conversion
Added automatic safe filename generation for uploaded images

change.item: Business architecture designed specifically for Joomla 6 and PHP 8.2+
Optimized for high-traffic business directories and editorial websites
Business images uploaded through the component are automatically optimized while existing Media Manager images remain untouched
Business Settings and administrator tools redesigned for improved usability and consistency with the DevArt component suite

security.item: Added ACL enforcement for administrator operations
Added CSRF protection for administrator actions
Added secure JSON import and export validation
Added parameterized database queries for import operations
Added safe file upload validation and image processing
Added safe output escaping throughout frontend rendering

note.item: First public production release of DevArt Business
Built exclusively for Joomla 6 with PHP 8.2+
No database migration required for new installations
CSV import tools support migration from existing business directories
JSON backup and restore provides complete site portability
Always test upgrades on a staging environment before production deployment
